whimsy_merchant.name: Whimsy Merchant
whimsy_merchant.description: Gives a 5% discount on all items in the bot shop and lets you sell junk items back for a bit more gold.
whimsy_merchant.flavor: You know the secret handshakes of the marketplace.

pixie_pocket.name: Pixie Pocket
pixie_pocket.description: Increases gold found during exploration by 10% and boosts catch rate on all wild beasts by 5%. Bigger pockets catch more.
pixie_pocket.flavor: A tiny, enchanted pouch that expands slightly to hold extra items.

fable_scholar.name: Fable Scholar
fable_scholar.description: Your ChibiBeasts gain 10% more Experience Points from battles and training sessions.
fable_scholar.flavor: You've spent hours reading ancient, dusty scrolls about beast behavior.

bramble_walker.name: Bramble Walker
bramble_walker.description: Reduces the cooldown timer on passive exploration or scavenging commands by 10%.
bramble_walker.flavor: Woodland spirits guide your steps, making travel easier.

tether_of_fate.name: Tether of Fate
tether_of_fate.description: If your active beast is hit with a status condition, there is a 25% chance it instantly cures itself.
tether_of_fate.flavor: A glowing red string bonds your spirit to your lead beast.

stardust_touch.name: Stardust Touch
stardust_touch.description: Permanently increases the chance of encountering or hatching Rare and Epic beasts by 10%.
stardust_touch.flavor: A faint, glowing cosmic shimmer permanently rests on your fingertips.

spellbound_focus.name: Spellbound Focus
spellbound_focus.description: Increases the Critical Hit chance of all your active beasts by 10%.
spellbound_focus.flavor: You can channel your own energy to perfectly direct your beast's strikes.

chronos_hourglass.name: Chronos's Hourglass
chronos_hourglass.description: Reduces all passive training and cooldown timers across the bot by 20%.
chronos_hourglass.flavor: You carry a pocket watch that subtly warps time around your daily routines.

aura_of_phoenix.name: Aura of the Phoenix
aura_of_phoenix.description: Once per battle, when one of your ChibiBeasts is about to be knocked out, it survives with exactly 1 HP instead.
aura_of_phoenix.flavor: A warm, invisible flame shields your team from ultimate defeat.

astral_resonance.name: Astral Resonance
astral_resonance.description: All Celestial Shard gains increased by 15%. Once per week, skip 6 hours from any incubating egg. The stars are listening.
astral_resonance.flavor: You are perfectly in tune with the frequencies of the universe.

glimmering_fortune.name: Glimmering Fortune
glimmering_fortune.description: Grants a passive 0.05% chance to automatically upgrade any standard egg hatch into a random Divine Collection beast.
glimmering_fortune.flavor: The universe itself bends to ensure your success.

genesis_spark.name: Genesis Spark
genesis_spark.description: Increases the damage of all Ultimate moves by 10% and starts every battle with 20 bonus mana. The Spark doesn't wait.
genesis_spark.flavor: You carry the literal spark of creation within your soul.
